description: Style NoteWant to steal the show? Want to break off from the mundane? Want to set a trend? Want to stand out from the crowd? Now here's your chance to make an exclusive style statement with this Attivo watch from maxima - this is the time-piece you've been waiting for to class-up your accessory collection! The new range of watches are a fresh take on the Ssteele eye for perfection and are great for urban wear. Product DetailsCase style: Stainless steel round case Dial style: Black dial with white and silver hands Strap style: Black textured plastic strap with a tang claspFeatures: Date aperture on the 3 hour mark, Ssteele branding on the 12 hour mark, Maxima branding on the 6 hour mark and screw to reset time  Waterproof to 3 ATM, allowing you to wear it even when showeringWarranty: 1 year SizeCase diameter: 40 mm Case thickness: 7 mm
